category_definitions.syntax_error: Pure parser-level malformation: unbalanced parens, hyphenated predicates, trailing commas, missing variable names — gold cannot be parsed as-is, but the intended encoding is reconstructible.
category_definitions.free_variable: Identifier intended as a constant or quantifier-bound variable but is parsed as a free individual variable; usually a renaming fix.
category_definitions.semantic_error: Gold parses (or is reparable into something that parses) but encodes the NL claim wrongly: wrong connective, wrong predicate scheme, or extra/missing assertion not warranted by NL.
category_definitions.scope_error: Quantifier scope mismatch: existentials with bodies that leak past the quantifier, universal/implication parens that put the operator outside the binder, or universal-pair quantification that should be existential-pair (and vice versa).
category_definitions.missing_predicate: NL claim is not encoded at all: a content-bearing component of the NL sentence (an adverb, an object, an additional conjunct) is dropped or collapsed into a predicate name that loses information.

per_premise.one_line_summary: Apostrophe in constant + unbalanced parens; the spurious second-witness existential is also dropped.
Existential body conjuncts leak past the binder; corrected to single existential matching NL 'some'.
Same scope-leak pattern as P1326; two-witness encoding unjustified by NL.
Unbalanced parens; manner adverb 'easily' folded into predicate to keep within binary scheme.
Hyphen in constant + duplicate LargeComplex conjunct.
Parens unbalanced AND disjunction-vs-conjunction wrong: NL coordinates with 'and'.
Hyphenated predicate Five-Story; trailing extra paren.
Treats TSLeda as unary predicate over x; corrected to constant-with-three-property scheme.
Trailing comma in argument list.
Dot in constant + tortured 'exactly two' universal-z encoding; corrected to at-least-two existential.
Single letters a/b/c parsed as free vars; renamed to gradeA/gradeB/gradeC constants.
Free 'a' is intended grade constant gradeA; minor antecedent restructure.
Same a-as-gradeA fix as P0768.
Free y plus universal-implies-negation says 'Peter plays nothing'; corrected to existential-with-inequality.
Paren grouping puts implication outside universal's body; rebalanced.
Free x in second conjunct, clear typo for 'henry'.
Unbalanced parens in nested negated existential.
Duplicate ∃y leaves z unbound; introduce missing ∃z binder.
Comma in numeric literal 400,000 tokenizes as free var; rename to constant.
Existential with no variable name; insert missing 'x'.
Biconditional-with-negation gives wrong logical content; 'only X did Y' is implication Y→X, not iff.
Hyphen in predicate British-Iraqi → CamelCase.
Unbalanced parens around four-conjunct list.
Negated open formula should be negated existential; binds y properly.
Existential-scope leakage; corrected to single existential matching NL 'some'.
p1080 flagged as free var; renamed to res1080p constant.
Unbalanced parens AND spurious Customer(lily) hallucination not in NL.
Free y in antecedent + 'two distinct others' overspecification; corrected to all-pair universal.
Unary 'WrittenWithCode' + unary 'MacOS' lose the dual-object content; rebuilt with binary WrittenWith.
Unbalanced parens + space before argument paren in DigestFoodInternally.
